31 class ExpressionsTesterService :
32 public ArcaneExpressionsTesterObject
33 {
34  public:
36  ExpressionsTesterService(const Arcane::ServiceBuildInfo & sbi)
37  : ArcaneExpressionsTesterObject(sbi)
38  , m_timer(sbi.subDomain(), "Timer", Timer::TimerVirtual)
39  , m_x()
40  , m_table_impl_cpu_comparison(false)
41  , m_performance_test(false)
42  {
43  ;
44  }

64  Real m_xmax_table, m_xmin_table;

68  // Test de performance

76  void diffEvalLimitPoints(IFunctionR1vR1* i_func);
77  bool _checkValues(const ConstArrayView<Real>& a , const ConstArrayView<Real>& b);
79  void _checkArray2Tools();
